payload.description: Operates seven bridges and two tunnels in New York City, handling over 330 million vehicle crossings every year in addition to managing the Congestion Relief Zone

payload.claim_text: Traffic at MTA Bridges and Tunnels in April 2026 declined by 417,881 vehicles, or 1.5%, compared to April 2025.
Year-to-date traffic through April 2026 was down 2,762,198 vehicles, or 2.6%, compared to the same period in 2025, partly due to snowstorms in January and February.

tool_args.label: Collision rate change April 2026 vs April 2025

payload.raw_value_text: 18.1% decrease from the rate of 2.70 per million vehicles recorded in April 2025

tool_args.label: Focused enforcement against toll evasion April 2026

payload.claim_text: MTA Bridges and Tunnels continued its focused enforcement efforts to address toll evasion across the system. These operations led to the interdiction of 187 persistent toll violators and the issuance of 5,265 summonses.
